glassmorphism.navbar: background-color: var(--surface-glass); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
glassmorphism.modal_content: background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);

cards.default: background-color: var(--surface-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
cards.hover: transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); border-color: var(--accent-gold);

buttons.primary: background-color: var(--primary); color: var(--text-inverse); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-weight: 500; transition: all 0.2s ease;
buttons.accent: background-color: var(--accent-gold); color: var(--text-inverse); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-weight: 600; transition: all 0.2s ease;

login_page.layout: Split screen or centered glass card over a high-quality hotel image background.
login_page.styling: Use glassmorphism for the login form container. Ensure high contrast for inputs.

staff_dashboard.interactions: Large touch targets (min 44px height). Floating Action Button (FAB) for quick photo uploads. Slide-up bottom sheets instead of modals for better mobile UX.
staff_dashboard.visuals: Clear 'Before' and 'After' photo thumbnails in task cards.

gm_dashboard.layout: Dense data view but breathable. 3-4 column bento-grid on desktop.
gm_dashboard.styling: Cards with muted gold accents on key metrics. Status indicators should use subtle background tints (e.g., bg-green-50 text-green-700) instead of harsh colors.

manager_dashboard.mod_mode: Manager On Duty mode should have a prominent, pulse-animated CTA (Deep Blue or Gold). Activating it changes the header context to indicate 'Live Reporting'.
manager_dashboard.photo_upload: Use a center glassmorphism modal on desktop, full-screen takeover on mobile.

reception_dashboard.styling: Use tabular layouts or dense horizontal cards. Sticky headers with backdrop-blur for table headers.

login_background.description: Modern luxury hotel exterior with glass facade, perfect for enterprise login screen background.

dashboard_header_bg.description: Vibrant exterior view of a luxury hotel, usable as a subtle header background or GM property cover photo.

icons.usage: Use consistent stroke width (1.5px to 2px). Ensure icons in buttons are vertically centered with text.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Since the app uses plain CSS classes via globals.css without Tailwind, you MUST define the colors, typography, shadows, and glassmorphism effects as CSS Custom Properties (:root) in globals.css.
Create highly reusable CSS utility classes in globals.css (e.g., .glass-panel, .card-premium, .btn-primary) instead of inline styles.
Implement the UI using vanilla Next.js components (.js) and apply the custom CSS classes.
Ensure the Staff Dashboard is explicitly built mobile-first, using CSS media queries (@media (min-width: 768px)) to scale up for larger devices.
Apply Outfit font to all headings and Manrope to body text.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all actionable elements.
